text.headline: Kehan Dong
text.text: Founder, angel investor, and educator building systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency.

text.headline: The Code of Love NGO (2011-2019)
text.text: Founded while in high school in Shanghai. Organized 1,700+ volunteers and delivered educational programs to more than 6,500 underprivileged students across five countries.

text.headline: University of California Dropout (2014)
text.text: Attended University of California before dropping out to pursue entrepreneurship full-time.

text.headline: Inner Journeys (2015-2019)
text.text: Started as a small project during junior year. Company was eventually acquired in 2020. Led to Forbes 30 Under 30 recognition and gave a deep appreciation for how young founders learn and grow.

text.headline: Y Combinator China (Mar 2019 - Nov 2019)
text.text: Joined the founding team as one of the youngest members selected by YC partners. Worked with Sam Altman and the global YC network on investment evaluation, founder support, and program design.

text.headline: MiraclePlus (Mar 2019 - Aug 2025)
text.text: Core founding team member. Evaluated 160,000+ applications, participated in 600+ early-stage investments. Built a 7,000+ member intern sourcing engine.

text.headline: Founder & Angel Investor (Sep 2025 - Present)
text.text: Three-month tour across 40 top U.S. universities. Invested in 30 young founders during this period. Over the past six years, made 650+ early-stage investments and built the largest student founder pipelines in China.
